summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GEO Boost Engine business form modal, payment integration, and testimonial features. All 15 requested features tested successfully including CTA buttons, business form with all fields, payment flow, testimonial hover animations, mobile carousel, and success page routing.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns version info (200 status)
Backend API /api/leads POST creates new lead successfully
Backend API /api/payments/create-session works with demo mode
Backend API /api/payments/confirm processes payment confirmation
Backend API /api/track analytics endpoint functional
Header CTA button opens business form modal
Hero CTA button opens business form modal
Pricing section CTA button opens business form modal
Final CTA button opens business form modal
Business form modal displays with all 7 required fields (business_name, website, location, business_type, owner_name, email, phone)
Form has dropdown for business type selection with 17 options
Form displays price summary showing $199
Form modal closes with X button
Testimonials show hover animation with stats overlay on desktop (New Leads, AI Platforms, Time to Results)
Mobile testimonials display horizontal scrollable carousel with 6 testimonials
Mobile testimonial cards show stats row with Leads, Platforms, Results
Success page route /success exists and loads correctly
Mobile sticky CTA is visible on mobile and hidden on desktop
Mobile sticky CTA opens business form modal when clicked
Complete form submission flow works end-to-end (form → lead creation → payment session → success page)
Analytics tracking events fire correctly (CTA clicks, form opens, scroll depth)
Payment integration works in demo mode with proper URL generation
Success page shows payment confirmation with proper messaging
